$comment: generated by the ocm schema generation tool
title: FileCleanupTransformation
description:
FileCleanupTransformation is a transformation specification that removes
temporary files that were buffered to the local filesystem during Get
transformations. It runs as a final node in the transformation graph,
after all other transformations have completed.

ocm.software.open-component-model.bindin.title: Type

ocm.software.open-component-model.bindin.title: FileCleanupOutput
ocm.software.open-component-model.bindin.description: FileCleanupOutput is the output of a FileCleanup transformation.

cleanedFiles.description: CleanedFiles is the number of files that were successfully removed.

ocm.software.open-component-model.bindin.$comment: generated by the ocm schema generation tool
ocm.software.open-component-model.bindin.title: FileCleanupSpec
ocm.software.open-component-model.bindin.description: FileCleanupSpec is the input specification for a FileCleanup transformation.

files.description:
Files is a list of file access specifications to clean up.
Each entry references a file that was buffered during a Get transformation.
